usedThreshold.description: Usage threshold at which the volume should be auto-grown. Must be a percentage between 1% and 99% (e.g., 80%).

growthAmount.description: Amount by which the volume size should be increased. Can be percentage (10%) or absolute (5Gi).

maxSize.description: The maximum allowable volume size growth expressed as an absolute value. Set to 0 for unlimited growth.

state.description: State represents the current state of the policy lifecycle.

message.description: Message provides detailed information about the policy status.
